name: triage filter classification treats LGTM and similar boilerplate comments as non-substantive when computing the threshold
command: printf '{"number":8,"merged":true,"author_type":"User","docs_only":false,"comments":[{"body":"LGTM"},{"body":"+1"},{"body":"thanks"}],"reviewer_requested_changes":false,"iterative_pushes":0}\n' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/triage.sh" --pr pr.json --classify-comments 2>out.txt && grep -q 'substantive_comments=0' out.txt && grep -q 'decision=reject' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=insufficient-comments' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
